The '''Imperials''' were a rival [[grav-crosier]] team to [[Jothan Tiaan Jerjerrod]]'s [[Ripper-Raptors]].Whilst being [[transport]]ed to [[Starkiller Base]] aboard a [[First Order]] [[Upsilon-class command shuttle|''Upsilon''-class command shuttle]], Jerjerrod noted the [[DeBoer|co-pilot]] reminded him of the Imperials [[Sweeper (grav-crosier)|sweeper]].<ref name="Attack on Starkiller Base" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Join the Resistance: Attack on Starkiller Base]]'' {{Ab|Join the Resistance: Books 1-3|audiobook}} {{1stm}}
